dateOfBirthIncomplete: Enter a date of birth and include a day, month and year

dateOfBirthPast: Date of birth must be in the past

prisonNumberLength: Enter a prison number with 7 characters

visitorsAdultsTooMany_other: Select no more than {{count}} visitors {{age}} years old or older
